untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern formation (geometric shape with expanding then contracting highs/lows) cannot be fully expressed with available point-in-time indicators. Pattern requires multi-bar shape recognition: identification of 4 turning points forming diamond outline, height-to-width ratio measurement, and consolidation detection. Conversion approximates with wide bandwidth (consolidation expansion phase) and price position mid-range (mid-diamond zone), but cannot validate the specific geometric diamond shape or distinguish tall vs. short patterns.
